news.t: Nicholas Wealth Adds Income-Focused Nuclear and Defense ETFs to Suite

overview.description: The Nicholas Defense and Rare Earth Income ETF (WEPN) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in target outcome asset allocation. The fund actively manages a portfolio composed of defense and rare earth industry companies, strategic metals and minerals commodities, and options overlay. The funds selection process is based on valuation, implied volatility, company fundamentals, and macroeconomic factors, including real interest rates and inflation. WEPN was launched on Mar 3, 2026 and is issued by Nicholas.

data.title: Nicholas Wealth Adds Income-Focused Nuclear and Defense ETFs to Suite
data.text: ATLANTA--(BUSINESS WIRE)---- $NUKX--XFUNDS by Nicholas Wealth, a leading provider of actively-managed income ETFs, today adds the Nicholas Nuclear Income ETF (NYSE Arca: NUKX) and the Nicholas Defense...
